Export & Packaging

We ship to 30+ countries with full export documentation, compliance support, and flexible packaging options for every market.

Global Reach

Export Markets

Trusted buyers across the globe receive consistent, certified product from Shritik Enterprises LLP.

🌙

Middle East

UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain

Cashew kernels, dehydrated onion & garlic

🇪🇺

Europe

Netherlands, Germany, UK, Spain, France, Italy

All products — EU-compliant specifications

🌎

North America

USA, Canada

Cashew kernels, dehydrated ingredients

🌏

Southeast Asia

Vietnam, Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippines

Cashew kernels, dehydrated onion & garlic

🇮🇳

South Asia

Sri Lanka, Bangladesh, Nepal

All products

🌍

Africa

South Africa, Kenya, Nigeria, Egypt

Cashew kernels, dehydrated ingredients

🦘

Australia & NZ

Australia, New Zealand

Cashew kernels, dehydrated vegetables

🏔️

Central Asia

Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan

Dehydrated ingredients

End-to-End Support

Export Services

01

Pre-Shipment Quality Check

Third-party or buyer-nominated lab testing before shipping — we facilitate access and sampling.

02

Export Documentation

Full documentation support: phytosanitary, fumigation, COO, commercial invoice, packing list, COA.

03

Freight & Logistics Coordination

We coordinate with freight forwarders for FCL and LCL shipments from Indian ports.

04

Regulatory Compliance

Products prepared to meet EU, US FDA, Gulf standards, and destination country requirements.

05

Custom Labelling

Private label or white-label packaging with your branding, nutrition info, and barcodes.

06

Real-Time Updates

Shipment tracking and documentation shared proactively throughout the export process.

Flexible Options

Packaging Options

🥜

Cashew Kernel Packaging

  • 25kg vacuum-sealed foil bags in cartons
  • 10kg vacuum-sealed foil bags in cartons
  • Custom retail pouches (250g, 500g, 1kg) — private label
  • Bulk 50kg polypropylene bags with inner liner
🌿

Dehydrated Product Packaging

  • 25kg multi-layer paper/poly bags
  • 10kg food-grade poly bags in cartons
  • Retail jars or pouches (private label, on request)
  • Drums for powder products (20kg net)

Custom Sizes

We accommodate non-standard pack sizes for large buyers.

Custom Labelling

Nutrition labels, barcodes, and language variants for any market.

FCL & LCL

Full container loads and groupage shipments supported.

Any Port

Experience shipping to major ports across all export regions.

Ready to Start Importing from India?

Share your product, quantity, destination, and packaging requirements — we'll send a detailed quote within 24 hours.

Send Export Inquiry
Shritik Enterprises
LLP

India-based manufacturer and exporter of premium cashew kernels, dehydrated onion, garlic, and ginger. Serving worldwide export markets with certified, quality-focused food ingredients.
